Portrait Study

Graphite on paper
Sold
✦

Hello — I'm Charo, also known as Karo, working under kitt.visuals.

I work primarily in graphite and acrylic, drawn to portraiture, light, and the quiet weight of a single moment. Each piece is made entirely by hand, often over many sittings, with attention to texture and tone the way the old masters approached their canvases.

Pieces shown here are available as original paintings only — each one a single, unrepeatable work. Commissions for portraits open periodically.

Instagram — @kitt.visuals WhatsApp — +977 974 569 5866
